primary-lime.usage: Primary action, selected chip, active route, and progress emphasis only.

cobalt-link.usage: Readable text links and actions on light backgrounds.

card-surface.usage: Tables, compact headers, dialogs, and form panels.

title.purpose: Compact operations headers and page titles.

body.purpose: Normal UI copy, descriptions, and row metadata.

label.purpose: Filters, badges, status chips, metadata, and helper text.

elevation.philosophy: Tonal layering and borders first; shadows only for overlays or state.

tokens.surface-subtle: shadow-sm only when a compact container needs separation

rules: Lime is rare and never used for small body text on light backgrounds.
Daily pages show operational work first, not technical internals.
Related queues share filter bar, date range, pagination, and dialog primitives.
Dangerous actions explain impact and rollback before final confirmation.
Do not add decorative gradients, glass effects, oversized hero sections, or nested cards.
